arts.sum: Atletico Madrid have set their sights on one of the South America’s brightest talents, but signing him will not be easy – and not only because Manchester City are also said to be sniffing around. Last week, it was reported that Atleti have registered their interest in Franco Mastantuono. arts.ttl: Manchester City star videoed hobbling into Barcelona hospital on crutches – Further concern
arts.sum: Manchester City star Erling Haaland has been spotted at a hospital in Barcelona for medical tests on the ankle injury picked up against Bournemouth. El Chiringuito provide video footage of the Manchester City striker today, entering the unidentified hospital in Spain on crutches ahead of apparent scheduled medical tests. arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man City among top European clubs 'interested in summer move for surprise Romanian defender' with release clause of just £21m
